character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Participated in discussions about the treasure voyage and evaluated Long John Silver's actions.

character_dossiers.name: Long John Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Cook who engaged in humorous interactions with Hawkins and discussed ship details.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: Discussed the treasure voyage with the crew and expressed concerns about the mission.

character_dossiers.name: Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: Narrator who observed and interacted with Long John Silver and the crew.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: Participated in discussions about the treasure voyage and interactions with the crew.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Arrow
character_dossiers.biography: Mate of the ship described with physical traits and interactions with the crew.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: Expressed dissatisfaction with the voyage and crew dynamics.

character_dossiers.name: the cook
character_dossiers.biography: Individual who managed the kitchen and interacted with Hawkins.

character_dossiers.name: Black Dog
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned as a character involved in the narrative.
